connect.floorPlanDesc: Visual table management with drag & drop
connect.waiterDesc: Let waiters order from their phones
connect.enterCode: Enter the connection code from your

modules.tablesDesc: Manage floor plan and table orders
modules.moduleLockedDesc: This module requires Level {{level}} subscription. Upgrade your feast. plan to unlock this feature.

directOrder.tapToAdd: Tap items to add them here

tables.noFloorsHint: Add a floor, then use Edit Layout to place tables

tableDrawer.selectItemsHint: Select items and quantities for this person:
tableDrawer.divideHint: Divide the remaining total equally among people:

floorEditor.label: Label
floorEditor.wallHint: Drag to draw — direction is auto-detected from your drag
floorEditor.brushHint: Paint wall cells by dragging over the grid
floorEditor.eraserHint: Drag over walls to erase them
floorEditor.placeHint: Click to place · drag to move · drag corner handle to resize tables
floorEditor.labelHint: Labels use a 1×1 cell. Shorter text works best.

analyze.highDiscountWarning: High discount usage — review whether discounts are driving incremental sales or eroding margin.
analyze.healthyDiscount: Discount usage is within a healthy range.
analyze.crossProductSub: Items appearing in the same checkout
analyze.campaignSub: Promotion suggestions based on sales data
analyze.upgradeHint: Upgrade your feast. subscription to unlock detailed analytics and AI analysis.
analyze.noDaily: No daily data for this month.
analyze.noDataHint: Once orders are paid, analytics will appear here.
analyze.noInsights: No AI insights yet — keep collecting orders.

trend.summary_up: Revenue increased {{pct}}% in the second half of this period.
trend.summary_down: Revenue decreased {{pct}}% in the second half of this period.
trend.summary_stable: Revenue remained stable throughout this period.
trend.detail: First half: {{currency}}{{firstHalf}} ({{firstCount}} orders) → Second half: {{currency}}{{secondHalf}} ({{secondCount}} orders)
trend.action_up: Momentum is positive. Consider expanding successful items or testing slight price increases.
trend.action_down: Review menu pricing, run promotions, or investigate drops in foot traffic.
trend.action_stable: Consistent demand. Focus on margin optimization and upselling.

peak_hours.title: Peak Hour Analysis
peak_hours.summary: {{pct}}% of orders concentrate in your top 3 hours: {{hours}}.
peak_hours.actionWithDead: Ensure full staffing at {{topRange}}. Consider happy-hour deals at {{deadHours}} to boost off-peak sales.

stars.title: Star Products
stars.summary_one: {{count}} item leads in both volume and revenue per sale.
stars.summary_other: {{count}} items lead in both volume and revenue per sale.
stars.action: Ensure consistent quality and stock. Test slight price increases to grow margin without losing volume.

hidden_gems.title: Hidden Gems Detected
hidden_gems.summary_one: {{count}} item earns above-average revenue per sale but has low order count.
hidden_gems.summary_other: {{count}} items earn above-average revenue per sale but have low order count.
hidden_gems.action: Promote these on your menu board or via waiter recommendations — they convert well but need visibility.

underperformers.title: Underperforming Items
underperformers.summary_one: {{count}} item has low orders and below-average revenue.
underperformers.summary_other: {{count}} items have low orders and below-average revenue.
underperformers.action: Consider removing, revamping the recipe, or replacing these with better-performing alternatives.

concentration.title: Revenue Concentration Risk
concentration.summary: Top 3 items account for {{pct}}% of item revenue.
concentration.action_high: High dependency — if any top item becomes unavailable, revenue drops significantly. Actively promote mid-tier items.
concentration.action_moderate: Moderate concentration. Keep monitoring and nurture variety across the menu.

day_opportunity.title: Weekday Opportunity
day_opportunity.action: Run {{worst}}-specific promotions (happy hours, combo deals) to lift traffic on your slowest day.

combo.title: Combo Menu Opportunities
combo.summary_one: {{count}} item pair is frequently ordered together — combo-deal candidate.
combo.summary_other: {{count}} item pairs are frequently ordered together — combo-deal candidates.
combo.action: Bundle these into combo deals. Combos increase perceived value and average order size.

order_value.title: Order Value Skew
order_value.summary_avg_above: Average order ({{currency}}{{avg}}) exceeds median ({{currency}}{{median}}) — a few large orders inflate the average.
order_value.summary_median_above: Median ({{currency}}{{median}}) exceeds average ({{currency}}{{avg}}) — many small orders pull the average down.
order_value.action_avg_above: Upsell add-ons (sides, drinks, desserts) to raise the typical order size, not just a few big ones.
order_value.action_median_above: Order sizes are consistent. Focus on upselling strategies to lift the average ticket.

category_dominance.title: Category Dominance
category_dominance.action_high: Over-reliance on one category. Promote other categories with deals or menu placement changes.
category_dominance.action_moderate: One category leads strongly. Consider featuring second-tier categories to diversify revenue.

server.startHint: Start the server to allow waiters and kitchen staff to connect
server.localDesc: Devices connect directly over your Wi-Fi. Fastest and most private — no data leaves your network.
server.feastTunnelDesc: Dedicated tunnel through feast. servers. Stable permanent URL, fastest remote connection, auto-reconnect.
server.localRecommendation: All staff devices (phones, tablets) are connected to the same Wi-Fi network as this computer. Best performance and full privacy.
server.feastRecommendation: You need a reliable, always-the-same URL for your staff. Works across any network with automatic reconnection if connection drops.
server.portSubtitle: Change the port the server listens on (requires restart)
server.stopToChange: Stop the server to change the port
server.scanToOpen: Scan to open the waiter ordering interface
server.step1: Scan the QR code with a phone or tablet
server.step2: Select "Waiter" role to take orders from tables
server.step3: Visit the URL and select "Kitchen" to display incoming orders
server.localWarning: All devices must be on the same Wi-Fi network
server.feastTunnelInfo: Devices can be on any network — your feast. tunnel URL is permanent
server.shareUrl: Share this URL with staff on any network
server.permanentUrlInfo: This URL is permanent and stays the same across restarts.

settings.uiModeSub: Touchscreen mode enlarges buttons, text and spacing. Compact mode is the classic dense layout.
settings.uiModeTouchDesc: Bigger buttons, ideal for touch displays
settings.uiModeCompactDesc: Classic dense layout, best for mouse/keyboard
settings.uiModeNote: Analytics and the waiter/kitchen server UI are never resized.
settings.refreshSubtitle: Enter your connection code to fetch latest menu
settings.disconnectSub: Remove this restaurant from this device
settings.unclosedSub: All orders that have not been paid or deleted
settings.clickToLoad: Click Load to check for unclosed orders.
settings.noDiscounts: No discounts defined. Add some for quick checkout.
settings.exportSub: Save floors, tables, discounts, and settings as a .feast file
settings.importSub: Restore from a previously exported .feast file (replaces floors/tables/discounts)
settings.dataRetentionSub: How many days of order history to keep
settings.gridSizeSub: Number of columns and rows in the floor layout editor
settings.pruneSub: Delete order records older than the retention period
settings.approvalModeSub: When enabled, kitchen staff explicitly marks orders as ready. When disabled, orders auto-progress by time.
settings.timerSub: Colors shown on kitchen order cards based on elapsed time
settings.timerProgression: Green → Amber (between green & red) → Red → Blinking → Auto-done
settings.directOrderTTLSub: How long a paid direct order stays visible in the kitchen view for preparation
settings.passwordSub: When set, a password is required to access Settings, Analytics, and Server
settings.passwordWarning: Password is currently set. Enter a new one to change it, or leave blank to disable.
settings.lockNowSub: Re-lock protected sections immediately — next access will require the password
settings.languageSub: Choose the display language for the application

appShell.refreshHint: Enter your connection code to refresh the cached menu data.
